burning.name: Burning
burning.description: This unit takes damage at the start of each turn.

poisoned.name: Poisoned
poisoned.description: This unit takes poison damage each turn until the effect expires.

frozen.name: Frozen
frozen.description: This unit cannot move until the effect ends.

stunned.name: Stunned
stunned.description: This unit cannot move, attack, or use abilities.

healing.name: Healing
healing.description: This unit restores health each turn.

rooted.name: Rooted
rooted.description: This unit cannot move but may still attack.

camouflaged.name: Camouflaged
camouflaged.description: This unit is harder to target until it attacks or moves.

fear.name: Fear
fear.description: This unit suffers reduced combat effectiveness.

regenerating.name: Regenerating
regenerating.description: This unit restores health every turn.

bleeding.name: Bleeding
bleeding.description: This unit loses health after moving or fighting.

marked.name: Marked
marked.description: This unit receives additional damage from attacks.

invulnerable.name: Invulnerable
invulnerable.description: This unit cannot take damage while this effect lasts.
